name: What if I have pre-existing distrust but AI still referred me wrong?
description: Claim still viable if AI caused added harm.[3]

mainEntity.name: What if I have pre-existing distrust but AI still referred me wrong?

acceptedAnswer.text: Claim still viable if AI caused added harm.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Pre-existing issues don't bar claims if AI referral worsened outcome; prove incremental harm. Ethics require competence regardless.[3] Factors: records showing AI ignored your specifics. Nationwide consistency. Strengthen with psych records if distress.
